title: Goety: Revelation
description: A highly worthwhile Goety expansion mod to play
body:
![LOADER FORGE](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Forge-ecebe6?labelColor=B446C6&style=for-the-badge) ![AVAILABLE 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available-1.20.1-ecebe6?labelColor=B446C6&style=for-the-badge) 
![Main Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9065ea5b751f8caebd0877bf174767f262c4d823.png)
This mod has added a method to summon **Apollyon**, as well as other related items.

Need [**Goety**](https://modrinth.com/mod/goety).

**After witnessing the might of the Nether Apostle, you finally succumb to the temptation of forbidden knowledge. Upon unveiling that hidden page of destruction, you discover a concealed path of Ascension...**  

To address the late-game weakness of Goety in modpacks, **Goety: Revelation** emerges.  
This mod aims to comprehensively strengthen end-game Goety while introducing powerful new items.  

### Challenge the Lord of Apocalypse  
After defeating the Apostle, players may obtain the **Broken Halo**. Use it to summon **Apollyon**—the long-silent High Priest of the Nether Church.  
To challenge Apollyon, players must gather:  
- The Apostle’s **Extinguished Divinity**  
- Rare artifacts collected across **the three dimensions**  

Upon victory, obtain the **Halo of Ascension**—an immensely powerful accessory that, when paired with the Nether Staff, greatly enhances certain Focus abilities.  

### Additional Content  
Revelation isn’t just a boss fight. It adds:  
- New armor sets, devices, and accessories  
- Hidden secrets  
- Expanded **Goety content** (e.g., spell power like *[Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)*, customizable rituals/potions) for players/modpack creators  

### Future Plans  
- New creatures  
- Boss-themed Focus abilities  

### Known Issues  
- Incompatible with *[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations/)* (causes unbeatable Apostle bug)  
- Visual glitches with *Better First Person* mod  
- Versions **below 2.1.7** only support **[Tetra](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetra) 6.3.0 or earlier**. 
### Incidentally:
- If you are a practitioner of the dark arts and also wish to create novel delicacies, then I must recommend you try [**Goety Delight**]([https://modrinth.com/mod/goety](https://modrinth.com/mod/goetydelight)).
